data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. CHEESY GARLIC makes her first outing and has drawn to advantage. Expected to have ability and can go close in this field. 2. RAGING PARTY settled well back early on debut and boxed on fairly to finish fifth (22.74) at this track over 380m. Expected to do much better this time. 7. BLUE JET TRAIN has his first outing without a trial but profiles nicely for this. Expected to play a major role. 8. SWANKY FRANKY must be among the chances on the last run here.","runners":[1,2,7,8],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: TOWNSVILLE-R1-Fav Out
